DOT/FMCSA Compliance API
DocsAPI ReferencePricing

API Reference

Install via Smithery, query from any MCP-compatible AI agent.

Tools

lookup_dot_standard

ParameterTypeDescription
querystringSearch term or 49 CFR section number
scopestringfmcs|hos|hazmat|csa|driver|vehicle|accident|drug_alcohol|all

get_hos_rules

ParameterTypeDescription
carrier_typestringproperty|passenger|hazmat|all
rule_typestringdriving_time|duty_time|off_duty|sleeper|all

get_violation_info

ParameterTypeDescription
codestringe.g. 395.3A
basic_areastringHOS|DRF|BDD|VEH|MAC|SSR|VEO
severity_minnumber1-10

get_dot_penalties

ParameterTypeDescription
categorystringhos|eld|hazmat|out_of_service|all

get_hazmat_info

ParameterTypeDescription
class_numberstring1-9 or divisions like 2.1, 4.3
packing_groupstringI|II|III

check_csa_basic

ParameterTypeDescription
basic_codestringHOS|DRF|BDD|VEH|MAC|SSR|VEO

DOT/FMCSA Compliance API — Built with plain-English summaries from official 49 CFR data.

Data current as of April 2026. Not legal advice.
